info.title: SEPM CONTENT API
info.description: Self-contained OpenAPI 2.0 specification for SEPM content endpoints.

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.

get.summary: Gets the latest revision information for antivirus definitions from Symantec Security Response.

contentName.description: Refers to Virus and Spyware Protection definitions.

publishedBySEPM.description: The latest Virus and Spyware Protection definition revision version available from Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager.

publishedBySymantec.description: The latest Virus and Spyware Protection definition revision version available from Symantec.
